case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. MARCELA CHAVEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-10-2016 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $125.00 SERVED OCT-13-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, MARCELA
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $38.60 ACCRUED INTEREST, $200.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
COST BILL, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $114.49 INTEREST, $435.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FEE FOR ATTEMPTING SERVICE: $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, MARCELA
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, MARCELA
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,028.60 AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, MARCELA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, MARCELA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-10-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-10-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE CAROLINA PALACIOUS DOMINGUEZ, CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE AT APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MARCELA CHAVEZ. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, MARCELA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $265.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,765.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/10/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-NO MAIL RECEPTACLE-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
